summary: Tested HoneyGroove vinyl platform format selection and modal features. 5 features tested: Add Record format picker, Create Haul per-item format, Daily Prompt variant modal, Listing Detail Modal sizing, Trade Detail Modal sizing.

add_record_format_picker.details: Format picker found with data-testid='format-picker'. All three format buttons (Vinyl/CD/Cassette) present with correct data-testids. Vinyl selected by default. Auto-detection from Discogs format data working.

create_haul_per_item_format.details: Per-item format pills found with data-testid='haul-format-{discogs_id}-{vinyl|cd|cassette}'. All three formats clickable. Format selection toggles correctly between Vinyl/CD/Cassette.

daily_prompt_variant_modal.details: Variant pill with data-testid='prompt-variant-pill' found in Daily Prompt carousel. Clicking pill opens variant modal (not navigation to variant page). URL stays at /hive. Modal displays correct variant info.

listing_detail_modal_sizing.details: Modal found with data-testid='listing-detail-modal'. Style correctly set: minWidth 340px, maxWidth min(420px, 95vw). On 390px mobile viewport, modal width was 337px (within expected range). Album art w-48 class present. Artist text-base class present.

trade_detail_modal_sizing.details: Code verified: minWidth 340px, maxWidth min(420px, 95vw). Scrollable content with overflow-y-auto max-h-[85vh]. Could not test interactively as no trade listings exist (Trade count: 0).

success_rate.backend: 66% (4/6 passed - 2 failed due to incorrect API paths, not feature bugs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features pass. Format picker on Add Record and Create Haul pages working. Daily Prompt variant pill correctly opens modal. Listing Detail Modal sizing correct at 340-420px. Trade Detail Modal code verified but no trade data exists to test interactively. Test credentials: katie/HoneyGroove2026.
